## Affected packages

## Checklist

- [ ] I added a changeset (`npx changeset`) if any published file
      changed (`packages/*/src/**` or `packages/*/package.json`).
      _Repo-tooling-only PRs do not need a changeset._
- [ ] If I changed a package's public API, I updated that
      package's `README.md` in the same PR.
- [ ] If I added or changed a workflow, I updated
      `docs/workflows.md`.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] I followed the ESM-only policy (no CJS output, no `"main"`
      field added). See `.github/instructions/package-exports.instructions.md`.
